en.title: Web Design & Development Agency in London | Next-Gen Tech
en.description: Expert web development agency in London, UK. We build highly converting e-commerce sites, fintech apps, and B2B platforms using the modern JS ecosystem.
en.h1: Premium Web Engineering for London's Most Ambitious Businesses
en.p: AVPdev builds the digital infrastructure London businesses need to compete globally: Next.js platforms, scalable APIs, and intelligent Telegram automation.

benefits.title: GDPR & UK Privacy
benefits.desc: We build privacy-first applications ensuring full compliance with strict UK data protection laws.

benefits.title: E-commerce Mastery
benefits.desc: Seamless integration with Shopify, Stripe, and UK-focused logistics and payment providers for maximum checkout conversions.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in London?
faq.a: Pricing starts from £250 for Astro landing pages and £300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from £750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from £50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
